fields.summary: Collector cannot complete credit card checkout on release page
fields.description: Customer sees a payment failed state after entering credit card details. Coinflow opens, then returns to the release page without minting.

fields.summary: Favorites tab says user not found after favoriting artwork
fields.description: Favoriting shows a success toast, but the profile favorites tab is empty and sometimes says user not found.

fields.summary: Creator asks whether Liquid Edition custom mechanics are supported
fields.description: Creator wants to know if burn-to-mint and custom claim flows are supported in the SuperRare UI.

fields.summary: Search results show the wrong creator profile
fields.description: A collector searched for a creator and clicked the result, but the page showed another account with a similar name.
